query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS automation_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  automationId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  automationName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `trigger` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('success', 'error', 'skipped') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'success',
  affectedCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  result TEXT,
  errorMessage TEXT,
  executedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  executedBy INT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS automation_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  automationId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  automationName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `trigger` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('success', 'error', 'skipped') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'success',
  affectedCount INT DEFAULT 0,
  result TEXT,
  errorMessage TEXT,
  executedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  executedBy INT
);
